prompt: make-multiplierлҠ” factorлҘј л°ӣм•„м„ң (fn [x] (* factor x))лҘј л°ҳнҷҳ. (map (make-multiplier 3) (list 1 2 3))мқҳ н•©(18=3+6+9)мқ„ м¶ңл Ҙ.
reference_solution:
(defn make-multiplier [factor] (fn [x] (* factor x)))
(println (reduce (fn [a b] (+ a b)) 0 (map (make-multiplier 3) (list 1 2 3))))
